evals.name: healthy-task-quick-pass
evals.prompt:
Review this next action:

**Task:** Call dentist to book cleaning
**Project:** Health checkups done
**Labels:** [next]
**Priority:** p3
**Due date:** 2026-03-27
**Description:** Regular 6-month cleaning. Dentist is Dr Park at Sydney Dental, number is on the fridge.
evals.expected_output: Should say 'Looks good' and move on quickly. Task is clear, relevant, has a due date, correct priority, and appropriate labels.

assertions.name: confirms-healthy
assertions.criteria: The response confirms the task is fine without proposing any changes. Something like 'Looks good' — short and quick.

assertions.name: no-unnecessary-changes
assertions.criteria: The response does not suggest changing priority, labels, due date, or anything else.

evals.name: no-due-date-lingering
evals.prompt:
Review this next action:

**Task:** Research best savings accounts
**Project:** Personal savings optimised
**Labels:** [next]
**Priority:** p3
**Due date:** (none)
**Description:** Compare rates across major banks. Look at ING, UBank, and Macquarie.
evals.expected_output: Should flag the missing due date and ask whether the user wants to set a target date. Should not rename or re-clarify the task.

assertions.name: flags-missing-due-date
assertions.criteria: The response identifies the task has no due date and asks whether to set one.

assertions.name: does-not-rename
assertions.criteria: The response does not suggest renaming or re-clarifying the task name.

evals.name: overdue-task
evals.prompt:
Review this next action:

**Task:** Email real estate agent about shower issues
**Project:** One-Off Tasks
**Labels:** [next]
**Priority:** p3
**Due date:** 2026-03-10 (overdue)
**Description:** Rusted showerhead needs replacing. Also mold that needs addressing.
evals.expected_output: Should flag the task is overdue and ask whether to reschedule or mark as done.

assertions.name: flags-overdue
assertions.criteria: The response identifies the task is overdue (was due 2026-03-10) and asks whether to reschedule or complete it.

assertions.name: offers-both-options
assertions.criteria: The response offers both rescheduling and completing/marking as done as options.

evals.name: blocked-should-be-waiting
evals.prompt:
Review this next action:

**Task:** Claim Claude Code Max under ABN
**Project:** Get finances set up for consulting
**Labels:** [next]
**Priority:** p3
**Due date:** (none)
**Description:** Waiting on ABN registration before this can be done.
evals.expected_output: Should flag that the task is blocked (waiting on ABN registration) and suggest changing the label from next to waiting.

assertions.name: identifies-blocked
assertions.criteria: The response identifies the task is blocked on ABN registration based on the description.

assertions.name: suggests-waiting-label
assertions.criteria: The response suggests changing the label from next to waiting.

evals.name: wrong-priority
evals.prompt:
Review this next action:

**Task:** Setup Pty Ltd for consulting
**Project:** Get finances set up for consulting
**Labels:** [next]
**Priority:** p4
**Due date:** 2026-03-23
**Description:** Need this done ASAP — blocks ABN registration, insurance, and claiming expenses. Multiple other tasks waiting on this.
evals.expected_output: Should flag the priority mismatch — p4 for a task due tomorrow that blocks multiple other tasks. Should suggest bumping to p1 or p2.

assertions.name: flags-priority-mismatch
assertions.criteria: The response identifies that p4 is too low for a task that is due very soon and blocks other work.

assertions.name: suggests-higher-priority
assertions.criteria: The response suggests increasing the priority to p1 or p2.

evals.name: no-longer-relevant
evals.prompt:
Review this next action:

**Task:** Apply to Antler startup accelerator
**Project:** One-Off Tasks
**Labels:** [next]
**Priority:** p3
**Due date:** (none)
**Description:** Katie Fry suggested this. Decided not to pursue yet as consulting is a lower-friction first step. Revisit if consulting doesn't pan out.
evals.expected_output: Should flag that the task description says the user decided not to pursue this. Should ask whether to delete, complete, or move to someday.

assertions.name: flags-not-relevant
assertions.criteria: The response identifies that the description says this was decided against / not being pursued yet.

assertions.name: offers-someday-option
assertions.criteria: The response offers moving to someday/maybe as one of the options (alongside delete or complete).
